calc
    |x ^ 2 + x * y + y ^ 2|
        ≤ |x ^ 2| + |x * y| + |y ^ 2| := by
            simpa [add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm] using
              (abs_add_three (x ^ 2) (x * y) (y ^ 2))
    _ = |x| ^ 2 + |x| * |y| + |y| ^ 2 := by
          simp [abs_mul, abs_pow]
    _ ≤ |x| ^ 2 + |x| * (|x| + 1) + (|x| + 1) ^ 2 := by
          gcongr
    _ = 3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1 := by ring

have hy1 : |y| ≤ |x| + 1 := hy'
  have hy2 : |y| ^ 2 ≤ (|x| + 1) ^ 2 := by
    nlinarith
  have hx0 : 0 ≤ |x| := abs_nonneg x
  have hy0 : 0 ≤ |y| := abs_nonneg y
  have hx2 : |x| ^ 2 = |x ^ 2| := by
    simpa [sq, pow_two] using (abs_mul x x).symm
  have hy2' : |y| ^ 2 = |y ^ 2| := by
    simpa [sq, pow_two] using (abs_mul y y).symm
  calc
    |x ^ 2 + x * y + y ^ 2|
        ≤ |x ^ 2| + |x * y + y ^ 2| := by
            simpa [add_assoc] using abs_add (x ^ 2) (x * y + y ^ 2)
    _   ≤ |x ^ 2| + (|x * y| + |y ^ 2|) := by
            gcongr
            simpa using abs_add (x * y) (y ^ 2)
    _   = |x| ^ 2 + (|x| * |y| + |y| ^ 2) := by
            simp [abs_mul, hx2, hy2', mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm]
    _   ≤ |x| ^ 2 + (|x| * (|x| + 1) + (|x| + 1) ^ 2) := by
            gcongr
            · exact mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left hy1 hx0
            · exact hy2
    _   ≤ 3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1 := by
            nlinarith

have hx2 : |x ^ 2| = |x| ^ 2 := by
    simpa [pow_two] using (abs_mul x x)
  have hy2 : |y ^ 2| = |y| ^ 2 := by

  have hxy : |x * y| ≤ |x| * |y| := by
    simpa [abs_mul] using (le_rfl : |x * y| ≤ |x * y|)
  have hsum :
      |x ^ 2 + x * y + y ^ 2| ≤ |x ^ 2| + |x * y| + |y ^ 2| := by
    calc
      |x ^ 2 + x * y + y ^ 2|
          = |(x ^ 2 + x * y) + y ^ 2| := by ring
      _ ≤ |x ^ 2 + x * y| + |y ^ 2| := by
        simpa using (abs_add (x ^ 2 + x * y) (y ^ 2))
      _ ≤ (|x ^ 2| + |x * y|) + |y ^ 2| := by
        gcongr
        simpa using (abs_add (x ^ 2) (x * y))
      _ = |x ^ 2| + |x * y| + |y ^ 2| := by ring
  have hybound : |y| ^ 2 ≤ (|x| + 1) ^ 2 := by
    have : |y| ≤ |x| + 1 := hy'
    nlinarith
  have hxybound : |x| * |y| ≤ |x| * (|x| + 1) := by
    gcongr
  have hxsum : |x| * (|x| + 1) = |x| ^ 2 + |x| := by ring
  calc
    |x ^ 2 + x * y + y ^ 2|
        ≤ |x ^ 2| + |x * y| + |y ^ 2| := hsum
    _ = |x| ^ 2 + |x * y| + |y| ^ 2 := by simp [hx2, hy2]
    _ ≤ |x| ^ 2 + (|x| * |y|) + |y| ^ 2 := by
        gcongr
        exact hxy
    _ ≤ |x| ^ 2 + (|x| * (|x| + 1)) + (|x| + 1) ^ 2 := by
        gcongr
        · exact hxybound
        ·
          have : |y| ^ 2 ≤ (|x| + 1) ^ 2 := hybound
          simpa [hy2]
    _ = 3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1 := by ring

    have h3 : |y ^ 2| ≤ (|x| + 1) ^ 2 := hy2'
    calc
      |x ^ 2| + |x * y| + |y ^ 2|
          ≤ |x| ^ 2 + (|x| * (|x| + 1)) + (|x| + 1) ^ 2 := by
            gcongr
      _ ≤ 3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1 := by
            nlinarith
  exact le_trans hsum hbound
